blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
